Dashboard.noInsight: Talk to the bot to receive perspective.
Dashboard.interpretation: It is the system's interpretation of your patterns. It helps you see clearly when you are trapped in the noise.
Dashboard.recorded: {count, plural, =1 {# session recorded} other {# sessions recorded}}
Dashboard.startTracking: Talk to the bot to start tracking your week
Dashboard.ptsAbove: {count} pts above your average — watch out
Dashboard.talkToBot: Talk to the bot to start tracking

frictionStates.activePauseSub: Your system detected critical overload. Rest is the mission.
frictionStates.clearMindSub: Low cognitive friction. You are in peak execution window.
frictionStates.processingLoadSub: Moderate mental friction. Monitor your energy and pace yourself.
frictionStates.highFrictionSub: Your system is under cognitive strain. Consider an active pause.

Dashboard.missionsGenerated: Missions are generated after your first session.
Dashboard.sendBotLog: Send a message to the bot to see your first log.
Dashboard.momentumAnchorSub: Focus on the first action. The rest waits in line.
Dashboard.freeMindSub: You have processed all the noise. Your biological RAM is ready to create, not to manage.
Dashboard.activePauseProtocolSub: Your system detected a critical load. {bold} Your only mission is the biological reset on Telegram.
Dashboard.noPendingTasks: There are no pending tasks today.
Dashboard.twilioSurveillance: Active Surveillance: Twilio monitors your inertia. If you get blocked, Twilio will call you.
Dashboard.tipProteccion: Close your eyes for 5 minutes. Your system will better process the noise.
Dashboard.tipEjecucion: If it takes less than 2 minutes, release it now.

Auth.loginDescription: Synchronize your account to manage your <cognitiveLoad>Cognitive Load</cognitiveLoad>.

Landing.heroSubtitle: Designed for <dynamicMinds>dynamic minds</dynamicMinds> needing to reclaim their execution power.
Landing.heroDescription: MindOps is the <operationalLayer>operational layer</operationalLayer> that detects when rumination, anxiety, or sadness overload your system, intervening to bring you back to the present.
Landing.simulatorDescription: Your mind is a high-impact processor. When background processes (anxiety/sadness) consume your mind, execution stops.
Landing.frictionMonitoringSub: We quantify the weight of your thoughts to predict blockages.
Landing.memoryDumpSub: Externalize mental noise and safely free up processing threads.
Landing.twilioInitiating: Initiating Twilio call for pattern interruption.
Landing.marqueeWords: Rumination, Blockage, Paralysis, Mental Chaos, Anxiety, Procrastination, Noise, Infinite Loop, Doubt, Fog

History.title: Thought History
History.description: All your released thoughts, from newest to oldest.
History.emptyDescription: Complete your missions to release thoughts. Each completed mission becomes part of your thought history.

Pairing.pendingDescription: Your code was accepted. Share your contact in Telegram to complete the connection.
Pairing.sharePrompt: Open the MindOps bot and tap the button to share your phone contact:
Pairing.autoUpdate: This page will update automatically once your contact is received.
Pairing.pairingDescription: Link your Telegram to start tracking your cognitive friction and take control of your mental clarity.
Pairing.linkAccount: Hello, {name}. Link your account to manage your cognitive load.
Pairing.sendExactMessage: Open your MindOps bot and send this exact message:
